nasb.text: Javan, Tubal and Meshech, they were your traders; with the lives of men and vessels of bronze they paid for your merchandise.

esv.text: Javan, Tubal, and Meshech traded with you; they exchanged human beings and vessels of bronze for your merchandise.

cnv.text: 雅完人、土巴人和米設人都與你通商；他們用奴隸和銅器來換取你的商品。

ccb.text: 雅完人、土巴人、米设人也跟你通商，用奴隶和铜器来换取你的货物。
